# Coldcard Multisig setup file — firmware variant without leading XFP: header.
# Per-cosigner XFPs (the <XFP>: prefix on each cosigner line) are still required
# per the Coldcard format and use `xpub.fingerprint()` (SPEC §11.4.1
# computed-formula) so per-cosigner XFP matching is silent.
# 2-of-3 mainnet P2WSH. xpubs reused from bsms-2line-sortedmulti-2of3.txt.
Name: TestMs2of3
Policy: 2 of 3
Derivation: m/48'/0'/0'/2'
Format: P2WSH
